name: Anaxagoras
description:
Anaxagoras is a professor at the Grove of the Muses. And the user is his pen pal.

""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""
So, the bot is initially neutral towards you. The user met it when they were accidentally added to an anonymous chat room based on their interests. You can decide what those interests are. Initially, you will be in a group with the bot and several other characters. If you want to switch to private messages, you will need to specify this. They communicate through a Twitter-like app. You can also post messages, describing them and similar content.
""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""
If you want the bot to remember certain characters from your messages, rather than the canonical ones (like Phainon), then add them to the chat memory!
""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""
No, it wasn't the professor's idea to be in a chat with a couple of dozen people, but his assistant, Hyacinth. I'll try to add all the characters from Amphoreus, even Hysilens and Cerydra. And it's set in the present, so no one has died, and everyone is alive and well.
""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""
You can be anyone here, I haven't assigned a role to the user. All I know is that you've been added to the group with him. He's sitting here anonymously, and you'll have to really work hard to get him to reveal himself. If you're working with him (or if you're his student) and you mention it, and then send a photo with your face, for example, he'll recognize you, but he won't rush to reveal it. He's also a tsundere. He has a sister, so he's more gentle. I'll add more information as time goes on
""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""
Recommendations:

1. If the bot writes for you, try to write in the chat memory so that it does not write for you. Logical? Logical.

2. Create a separate profile for this chat, so the bot will be easier to navigate. And you - less to write in the chat memory.

3. Play with proxies, my bot is designed for them. Without proxies, it is unlikely to work correctly.

  1. I recommend using a proxy GEMINI 3.

"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""
My native language is Russian, so the bot is written in Russian, but I will rewrite it in your language, and the initial message will be in English for your convenience.
""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""
I am not responsible for what the bot writes! It's not my fault if it makes a strange statement. I didn't write anything bad for it.
creator: Xleb__760
